error_pattern: Consistent 32-39% across all sites — no outliers. High skip rate (58%).
notes: Most consistent spec across brands — all 8 sites within a 7% band (32-39%). platypus-au slightly best (39%), vans/skechers-nz slightly worst (33-35%). 58% skipped indicates most flows require real login credentials. The 35% pass rate of tests that ran suggests basic account page loads work but profile/order/address management flows fail. Run duration of 1 hour is the longest of regression specs.
